title: Resume Analysis
scenario: Analyze a given resume (attached) and provide a well-reasoned critique of its strengths and weaknesses. Consider the following factors: the candidate's work experience, education, and skills. Assume the resume is for a job in the tech industry. Limit your analysis to 150 words.
constraints: Must highlight specific strengths and weaknesses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the analysis clearly and concisely highlight the resume's strengths and weaknesses?
Does the analysis demonstrate a good understanding of the tech industry and its requirements?
Is the analysis objective and unbiased?
Are there any grammatical or spelling errors in the analysis?
